titleStmt.title: SII 18.177: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 177. (B.K. No. 10 of 1932-33.) DĒVAGĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab built into the tīrtha-kuṇḍa in the temple of Yellamma.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanaikavīra Bijjaṇadēva and is dated in 1082 (apparently of the Śaka era), Vikrama, Chaitra s11u 1, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1160, March 10, Thursday, not Monday as stated in the record and there was no Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti on that day.

It registers a gift of land made by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Māchidēvarasa of the Jīmūtavāhana lineage and Khachara family, apparently to the temple of the god Grāmeśvara at Tammuge for the worship and offerings to that god. The gift was made in the presence of Heggaḍe Bammarasa and others for the merit of the chief's sister Lachchaladēvi. The receipient of the gift was Rāmasiṁgi-Paṇḍita. It also records other grants to the same temple made by Nāga-gāvuṇḍa of Tammuge, the Aruvattokkalu Daṇḍanāyaka Māyidēva, the officer in charge of taxes and others. It is stated that at the time of the grant, Daṇḍanāyaka Kariya Kēsimayya was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand and Māchīdēvarasa was administering Bāsavūra Hundred and forty.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mahōgra Some lines in the
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇna
vṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuryyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ kadanapa
caṁḍaṁ mānakanakācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkuśaṁ gajasāmaṁtaṁ śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjaraṁ
pratāpalankēśvaraṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ sanivārasiddhi giridurggamallacaladaṁkarāma vairībhakaṇṭhīrava nissaṁkamalla nāmādisa
mastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma cakravartti tribhuvanaikavīra śrībijjaṇadēvavijayarājya
mattarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpāda padmōpajīvi sva
sti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahā pracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ sēnādhipati kariyakēsima
yyaṁgaḷu banavāsi pannicchāsiramumaṁ sukhadināḷuttamire . © dharegesedirppa khēcarasuvaṁśa
sikhāmaṇi kāmabhūbhujaṁgaruṇasarōjavaktre padmavvege viśrutamallidēvanādara doḷe
kaligaṁ māraṇanunnatasiṁganudāra nendiṟe pesariṭṭavarppaḍedarumṁnataram sutaraṁ prasiddharaṁ . mattamā vaṁ
śadoḷ dharaṇīśaṁ siṁharājanātana magaṁ nityōdayaṁ sadguṇākaranātaṁ kali dēvanātana sutaṁ prakhyā
takīrttidhvajaṁ taruṇārkōdayatējanudghavibhava tnākaraṁ piridīvaṁ kali mācidēvanesedaṁ vairī
bhakaṇṭhīravaṁ . Āḍe kabandhanarttanamayaṁ karu dārddu suttalu kūḍe kaḍaṁgi perjjereya nettaranī
yōginīmayaṁ jēḍida khaṁḍamāṁsavidu sokkida bhūtapiśācinīmayaṁ nōḍire gaṁḍamaṁ
ḍaḷika mācarasaṁ geldājiraṁgadoḷ . svastisamadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtaṁ vijayalakṣmīkāntaṁ
samastavasumatītaḷakhyātaṁjīma �tavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ bandhujanakamaḷinīrājahaṁsaṁ
khacaravaṁśōttaṁsaṁ padmāvatīdēviya labdhavaraprasādaṁ tyāgavinōdaṁ birudamanne yamadanivāra
ṇaṁ bhāvana gandhavāraṇaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmat mācidēvarasaṁ bāsa vūranūṟanālvattu
maṁ sukhadināḷuttamire . Ātana parijanamanitu mātēṁ gaḍa vīraradhikasatyada caladiṁ khyātiyane tāḷdiniṁ
darnnītividarssāhasānvitarppalabaru . giri vajrāyudhanaṁ tama praka ravī tīvrāṁśuvaṁmattamā karigaḷ kēsariyaṁ bhu
jaṁganikaraṁ sauparṇnanaṁ gelugume dhareyoḷ viśrutakīrttiyarisucamūvidhvaṁsa saṁdhānanaṁ dhuradoḷ bammacamū
panaṁ gelvare vidviṣṭarī dhātriyoḷ . © Alarda sarōjaṣaṇḍavalavēṟeda mallige baṇḍa māvu kattalipelevaḷḷi baṇgo
legaḷiṁdaḷavēṟerimaiṁdavāḷe paṇgolegaḷoḷoppamaṁ paḍeva pūgavanaṁ pikanāda vettaluṁ tolagade niṁda
dēvagṛhadiṁdametanmmugeyoppi tōṟuguṁ . 1082 ḍeneya vikramasaṁvatsaradacai
trasu 1 sōmavāra mutterāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vatīpātadaṁdu heggaḍe bammara
sa mukhyavāgi samastaparigrahasahitaṁ śrīmaṁ mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ mācidēvara
saru taṁnna taṁge laccaladēvige śrayavāgi biṭṭa dharmmameṁteṁdaḍe svasti yamaniyamasvāReadśrī.
dhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpaṁnnarappa śrīma
tu rāmasiṁgipaṁḍitara kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi dēvaraṁgabhōga nivēdyakkaṁ
khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōdhdhārakkaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ biṭṭa dharmmameṁteṁdaḍe huliveṭṭa dōṇiyiṁ mūḍa haṇni
geṟeyōṇiyiṁ paḍuva Ere mattaleraḍu 2 kaṇnamageṟeyoḷage gardde kamma 300 tammugeya nā
gagāvuṁḍa mukhyavāgi Aṟuvattokkalu sahita biṭṭudu Okkalalu baṇnigekoḷaga Oṁdu 1 © svasti śrīma
n mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ suṁkadadhikāri māyidēvarasaru grāmēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa dharmma
mayduhēṟina heṟiṁka ṭhāṇōgamumaṁ pratipāḷisuvaru gāṇadalu Eṇne solage Oṁdu phugura
mūnūrvvaru darśanadi puṭṭitaṁ grāmēśvaradēvargge biṭṭaru [A*]ynūṟanālvaruṁ hannavaṇiga mu
khyavāgi Eleya bojaṁgaru AyduEleya hēṟina Arihavaṁ grāmēśvaradēvargge biṭṭar
tōṭigaru tōṭadalu Eleya kōlalu hāgamaṁ grāmēśvaradēvargge biṭṭaru yiṁtī dharmma
maṁ pratipāḷisidavaru gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalu sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa phalama
kku yī dharmmamanaḷidavaru gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalu sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇaru
maṁ koṁda paṁcamahāpātakamakku . © na viśaṁ viśamityāhu dēvasvaṁ viśamucyatē viśamēkā
kinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . Amṛtavāṇi bhōgadēvapaṇditadēvaṁ . mattaṁ suṁkada
dhikāri mūyidēvan hanneraḍuhēṟina sunka vokkaludeṟi dēvanī pa This line is engraved in bigger characters.Stops abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 18.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
